text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while on my way to the track before
training...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh no.
choice_data_list: Sky? The track's the other way.
Sky? The track's the other way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. Uh, I was just gonna go... grab us
something to drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her insincerity is blatantly obvious. This must
mean...
choice_data_list: So you were planning on skipping?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No waaay, of course I'd never!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, maybe I was, but maybe I wasn't... Nah, I
was totally going to. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Teehee. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Can't we take the day off? Pleeease, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: C'mon, the weather's so nice! Lift your head and look at that good stuff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's right. The sunshine's warm and comforting...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sunlight might always look the same, but the
truth is, it's different every day.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Every ray's as unique as a snowflake. We only
have a moment to enjoy each one.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, you get how important it is to take a break
now, right?
choice_data_list: I understand that you want to take the day off...
I understand that you want to take the day off...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on! I painted such an enchanting picture
just now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But you see, we can get something good out of
taking a break... maybe... Yeah, probably not,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I force her, it'll likely mess with her motivation...
There's no way we can train like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But what should I do?
choice_data_list: Let her rest until she's happy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: HUH?!
choice_data_list: Why not enjoy the sunshine while you run?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No way! I wanna snooze on a soft patch of grass!
choice_data_list:
But collapsing from exhaustion out on the turf
would feel great too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Urgh, so you're not gonna give up? Then I guess...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Aaarrgghhh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...
choice_data_list: You ran really well out there!
You ran really well out there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... You said it yourself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That collapsing from exhaustion out on the turf
would feel good. So I ran with everything I had...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm gonna lie down here, and you can't stop
me! Ahhh... It actually does feel pretty good. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I suppose listening to you pays off sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what are you doing standing up? Come lie
down already!
choice_data_list: You want me to rest too?
You want me to rest too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no one's looking. Just slide on down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I lie down on the turf with a worn-out
Seiun Sky, and we enjoy the breeze together.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm outta here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky runs off in a frenzied dash, right
toward...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Helloooo! One hefty menchi-katsu sandwich
pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Right now's when that store finishes making their
super popular "hefty" menchi-katsu sandwich.
Each one weighs a whole kilo.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All I have to do is slip into the hungry crowd.
There's no way Trainer will be able to get past
everyone. Then... I win. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I realize she's about to make her
escape, an idea strikes me.
choice_data_list:
Sky said she doesn't want her hefty
menchi-katsu sandwich!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: She doesn't?! Then I'll have hers!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Using the crowd against me?! Ngh... I don't have
the power to hold 'em all back!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gotta find a way out fast. If I can get away before
anyone figures out what's what...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm already in hot water! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ugh, you're such a schemer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to apprehend Seiun Sky, but now she
seems to be in low spirits.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, there's no way. You must have an ulterior
motive.
choice_data_list:
Sometimes we just have to rest as much as we
want.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're so generous, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll take you on a tour of my napping
spots! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ta-daaah. ♪ This is one of my special napping
nooks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Well, I've been using the place off and on
since before it was yours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's calm, it's quiet—it's a tip-top nap spot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're not looking too thrilled there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know I don't lavish this kind of praise on just
any old spot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep. That's just how it is. Well, see ya when I
wake up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I gently move the sofa in my room so
it catches the sun. That way, the happily snoozing
Seiun Sky can rest in its comforting rays.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I nap here, and...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I nap here, aaand...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, here too. And here, and here, and here...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aaand here too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well, I guess we can chill out here for
today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And after that, well... I'll run off someplace else.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You never know, there might be some places I'm
still not showing you.
choice_data_list: Was this all part of some scheme?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You didn't actually think I'd reveal my real
napping spots, did you? Come on, you'd start
finding me straight away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've shown you so many of them,
you'll have to check them all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ready to come find me? I'll be waiting! ☆ Hehe,
just kidding!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky seems fully committed to her
practice-skipping lifestyle.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? So can I start by resting now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're not worried I'll try to trick you and keep
skipping practice forever and ever?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
If I let you rest now, you won't skip out on me. I
know you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know when you say that kinda thing, it makes
me wanna do the opposite, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But since you're being so honest, I can't do ya like
that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So might as well stick to the plan. Come on,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, between her periodic breaks, Seiun Sky
works hard during the training session.
